# Store Distribution Architecture: MSIX Acceptance

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/storedistributiondocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to architecture](../architecture.md)

## `msix-sideload`

- Status: `preferred-first`
- Runtime role: `msix-packaged-helper-broker`
- Background rule: `explicit-consent`
- IPC/data root: `windows-named-pipe` / `windows-package-local-data`
- Update mechanism: `self-managed`

Required surfaces:

- signed-msix-package
- package-identity
- windows-desktop-target-device-family
- named-pipe-local-ipc
- package-local-data
- user-consented-background-helper

Forbidden surfaces:

- bundled-provider-cli
- silent-provider-install
- windows-service-default
- external-tcp-listener
- arbitrary-home-scan

## `msix-store`

- Status: `requires-policy-gate`
- Runtime role: `msix-packaged-full-trust-helper-tray`
- Background rule: `explicit-consent-and-store-review`
- IPC/data root: `windows-named-pipe` / `windows-package-local-data`
- Update mechanism: `store-managed`

Required surfaces:

- package-identity
- windows-desktop-target-device-family
- named-pipe-local-ipc
- package-local-data
- runfulltrust-review-note
- store-managed-updates
- partner-center-review-notes
- review-demo-mode
- privacy-policy
- demo-review-account
- privacy-metadata-allowlist
- provider-non-bundling-review-note

Forbidden surfaces:

- bundled-provider-cli
- silent-provider-install
- windows-service-default
- self-updater
- external-tcp-listener
- arbitrary-home-scan
